meta.name: Marker genes per cluster
meta.description: Rank differentially expressed marker genes per Leiden cluster (Wilcoxon), then keep the significant ones (uns['rank_genes_groups'] + uns['rank_genes_groups_filtered']). Needs an obs['leiden'] column (present on visium_hne, or run a preprocessing recipe first).

readme: Ranks differentially expressed marker genes per Leiden cluster with the Wilcoxon test, then filters to the significant ones. Requires `obs['leiden']` — present on visium_hne, or run 'Preprocess & cluster (raw counts)' / 'QC, filter & cluster (raw counts)' first.
